briefdescription.para: This function performs the CRC check of AES key.

parameterdescription.para: A 32 bit CRC value of an expected AES key.

simplesect.para: For Calculating the CRC of the AES key use the XilSKey_CrcCalculation() function or XilSkey_CrcCalculation_AesKey() function

briefdescription.para: This function is used to read a user fuse from the eFUSE or cache.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to an array which holds the readback user fuse.
A variable which holds the user fuse number. Range is (User fuses: 0 to 7)

Indicates whether or not to read from the actual eFUSE array or from the eFUSE cache.
0(XSK_EFUSEPS_READ_FROM_CACHE) Reads from eFUSE cache
1(XSK_EFUSEPS_READ_FROM_EFUSE) Reads from eFUSE array

simplesect.para: It is highly recommended to read from eFuse cache. Because reading from efuse may reduce the life of the efuse. And Cache reload is required for obtaining updated values for ReadOption 0.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to read the PPK0 hash from an eFUSE or eFUSE cache.

parameterdescription.para: A pointer to an array which holds the readback PPK0 hash.

Indicates whether or not to read from the actual eFUSE array or from the eFUSE cache.
0(XSK_EFUSEPS_READ_FROM_CACHE) Reads from eFUSE cache
1(XSK_EFUSEPS_READ_FROM_EFUSE) Reads from eFUSE array

simplesect.para: It is highly recommended to read from eFuse cache. Because reading from efuse may reduce the life of the efuse. And Cache reload is required for obtaining updated values for ReadOption 0.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to read the PPK1 hash from eFUSE or cache.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to an array which holds the readback PPK1 hash.

Indicates whether or not to read from the actual eFUSE array or from the eFUSE cache.
0(XSK_EFUSEPS_READ_FROM_CACHE) Reads from eFUSE cache
1(XSK_EFUSEPS_READ_FROM_EFUSE) Reads from eFUSE array

simplesect.para: It is highly recommended to read from eFuse cache. Because reading from efuse may reduce the life of the efuse. And Cache reload is required for obtaining updated values for ReadOption 0.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to read SPKID from eFUSE or cache based on user's read option.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to a 32 bit variable which holds SPK ID.

Indicates whether or not to read from the actual eFUSE array or from the eFUSE cache.
0(XSK_EFUSEPS_READ_FROM_CACHE) Reads from eFUSE cache
1(XSK_EFUSEPS_READ_FROM_EFUSE) Reads from eFUSE array

simplesect.para: It is highly recommended to read from eFuse cache. Because reading from efuse may reduce the life of the efuse. And Cache reload is required for obtaining updated values for ReadOption 0.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to read DNA from eFUSE.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to an array of 3 x u32 words which holds the readback DNA.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to read the PS eFUSE secure control bits from cache or eFUSE based on user input provided.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XilSKey_SecCtrlBits which holds the read secure control bits.

Indicates whether or not to read from the actual eFUSE array or from the eFUSE cache.
0(XSK_EFUSEPS_READ_FROM_CACHE) Reads from eFUSE cache
1(XSK_EFUSEPS_READ_FROM_EFUSE) Reads from eFUSE array

simplesect.para: It is highly recommended to read from eFuse cache. Because reading from efuse may reduce the life of the efuse. And Cache reload is required for obtaining updated values for ReadOption 0.

briefdescription.para: This function reloads the cache of eFUSE so that can be directly read from cache.

simplesect.para: Not recommended to call this API frequently, if this API is called all the cache memory is reloded by reading eFUSE array, reading eFUSE bit multiple times may diminish the life time.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to program the PS eFUSE of ZynqMP, based on user inputs.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XilSKey_ZynqMpEPs.

simplesect.para: After eFUSE programming is complete, the cache is automatically reloaded so all programmed eFUSE bits can be directly read from cache.

inbodydescription.para: Check the temperature and voltage(VCC_AUX and VCC_PINT_LP)

briefdescription.para: This function is used by PMUFW IPI call handler for programming eFUSE.

parameterdescription.para: Higher 32-bit address of the XilSKey_Efuse structure.
Lower 32-bit address of the XilSKey_Efuse structure.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS - On success ErrorCode - on Failure

briefdescription.para: This function sets timers for programming and reading from eFUSE.
This function returns particular row data directly from eFUSE array.

parameterdescription.para: specifies the row number to read.
specifies the eFUSE type.
is a pointer to 32 bit variable to hold the data read from provided data

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS - On success ErrorCode - on Failure

briefdescription.para: This function sets all the required parameters to program eFUSE array.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS - On success ErrorCode - on Failure

briefdescription.para: This function programs and verifies the particular bit of eFUSE array.

parameterdescription.para: specifies the row number.
specifies the column number.
specifies the eFUSE type.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS - On success ErrorCode - on Failure

briefdescription.para: This function initializes sysmonpsu driver.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS - On success ErrorCode - on Failure

briefdescription.para: This function is used verify eFUSE keys for Zeros.

parameterdescription.para: is row number from which verification has to be started.
is row number till which verification has to be ended.
is the type of the eFUSE in which these rows reside.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if keys are not programmed. Errorcode on failure.

briefdescription.para: This function programs the PS eFUSEs with the PUF helper data.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XilSKey_Puf instance.

simplesect.para: To generate PufSyndromeData please use XilSKey_Puf_Registration API

briefdescription.para: This function reads the PUF helper data from eFUSE.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to data array which holds the PUF helper data read from eFUSEs.

simplesect.para: This function only reads from eFUSE non-volatile memory. There is no option to read from Cache.

briefdescription.para: This function programs eFUSE with CHash value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XilSKey_Puf instance.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if chash is programmed successfully.

simplesect.para: To generate the CHash value, please use XilSKey_Puf_Registration function.

briefdescription.para: This function reads eFUSE PUF CHash data from the eFUSE array or cache based on the user read option.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer which holds the read back value of the chash.

Indicates whether or not to read from the actual eFUSE array or from the eFUSE cache.
0(XSK_EFUSEPS_READ_FROM_CACHE) Reads from cache
1(XSK_EFUSEPS_READ_FROM_EFUSE) Reads from eFUSE array

simplesect.para: Cache reload is required for obtaining updated values for reading from cache..

briefdescription.para: This function programs eFUSE PUF auxiliary data.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XilSKey_Puf instance.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the eFUSE is programmed successfully.

simplesect.para: To generate auxiliary data, please use XilSKey_Puf_Registration function.

briefdescription.para: This function reads eFUSE PUF auxiliary data from eFUSE array or cache based on user read option.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer which holds the read back value of PUF's auxiliary data.

Indicates whether or not to read from the actual eFUSE array or from the eFUSE cache.
0(XSK_EFUSEPS_READ_FROM_CACHE) Reads from cache
1(XSK_EFUSEPS_READ_FROM_EFUSE) Reads from eFUSE array

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if PUF auxiliary data is read successfully.

simplesect.para: Cache reload is required for obtaining updated values for reading from cache.

briefdescription.para: This function programs the eFUSE PUF secure bits.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XilSKey_Puf_Secure structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if eFUSE PUF secure bits are programmed successfully.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to read the PS eFUSE PUF secure bits from cache or from eFUSE array.

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to the XilSKey_Puf_Secure structure which holds the read eFUSE secure bits from the PUF.

- Indicates whether or not to read from the actual eFUSE array or from the eFUSE cache.
0(XSK_EFUSEPS_READ_FROM_CACHE) Reads from cache
1(XSK_EFUSEPS_READ_FROM_EFUSE) Reads from eFUSE array

briefdescription.para: This function performs registration of PUF which generates a new KEK and associated CHash, Auxiliary and PUF-syndrome data which are unique for each silicon.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XilSKey_Puf instance.

simplesect.para: With the help of generated PUF syndrome data, it will be possible to re-generate same PUF KEK.

inbodydescription.para: Request PUF to register. This will trigger an interrupt to CSUROM

briefdescription.para: This function regenerates the PUF data so that the PUF's output can be used as the key source to the AES-GCM hardware cryptographic engine.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XilSKey_Puf instance.
